content_body: Words cannot express how much we appreciate you letting us stay in your gorgeous cabin. The time we spent here will be a cherished memory. It was wonderful to reconnect with family. Your cabin is so comfortable, and we could relax, play pool, and laugh. I could just stay in the cabin and never leave. That said, we had a lot of fun going into Blue Ridge and checking out the fun shops and making a stop at the apple orchard. Along with traveling to Tennessee and North Carolina, I would say that the best part of this trip was being with family in the beautiful surroundings. Hanging out with everyone was awesome. Thank you for letting us stay in this fantastic place.
title: Fantastic Place
